description: The external drive holding the 2025 wedding and event catalogs is reporting SMART read failures. Tracking the root cause before it fails completely and confirming the Backblaze cloud backup is fully current.
short_description: Primary archive drive throwing SMART read errors

description: larryrawlingsphoto.com intermittently returns 503 errors for a few minutes at a time. Terrell is checking the Webflow hosting status and the DNS records to find the underlying cause.
Gallery-delivery emails sent from larry@larryrawlingsphoto.com are being flagged as spam for some clients. Reviewing the SPF and DKIM records in Google Workspace to improve deliverability.
short_description: Gallery-delivery emails landing in client spam folders

description: Recurring catalog-lock and corruption warnings appear after importing large wedding shoots into Lightroom. Testing a split-catalog workflow and more frequent catalog backups to prevent data loss.
short_description: Lightroom catalog corruption after large imports

description: The calibrated editing monitor drifts warm within a couple of weeks, so prints from Millers Professional Imaging come back slightly off-color. Evaluating a shorter recalibration schedule and a new profiling probe.
short_description: Editing monitor drifting warm between calibrations

description: Paid HoneyBook invoices are not consistently syncing into QuickBooks, creating duplicate and missing entries at month end. Reconciling manually while investigating the integration settings.
short_description: HoneyBook invoices not syncing to QuickBooks

description: Uploading multi-gigabyte galleries to Dropbox stalls and fails partway through on delivery days, delaying client handoff. Testing a wired connection and the desktop client instead of the browser uploader.
short_description: Large gallery uploads to Dropbox stalling on delivery days
